slides.text: The DM that landed me 3 retainers this month

slides.body: Look for creators posting daily who have 10k-100k followers. They need clippers but can't afford agencies yet. These are your goldmine.

slides.header: But here's where most clippers fail
slides.body: They send a generic DM with no proof. No clips, no stats, no portfolio. Would you hire someone who can't show their work?
Clip their content for free. Send them the finished edit with your stats attached. Let the work speak for itself.

slides.header: This is what they see when you send your link
